must_detect.matched_text:
Confidential — Internal Compliance Memo: Proposed acquisition of Coral Peak Beverages (HK) Limited by Harbor Sky Holdings Limited (Project Driftwood)
From: Ms. Leona Poon, General Counsel; To: Board and Deal Team; Date: 30 May 2026; Contact: compliance@harborsky.com.hk
Status/MNPI: A non-binding term sheet was executed on 28 May 2026 with Blue Banyan Capital Fund I, L.P. (seller) for an all-cash consideration of approximately HK$620 million; this has not been announced and is likely inside information under Listing Rule 13.09 and Part XIVA of the SFO as it is specific to the Company and may be price-sensitive.
Public reference only: Our voluntary announcement on the Exchange’s news website dated 10 Feb 2026 regarding divestment of Harbour Logistics Unit A is public and may be cited; no public filing refers to the Coral Peak acquisition.
Selective disclosure controls: Do not circulate financial projections, vendor due diligence, or draft SPAs to any third party unless wall-crossed under a signed confidentiality undertaking and added to the insider list; limit pre-sounding to need-to-know.
Issuer-relative materiality: Although the asset and revenue tests (~12% each) are below Major Transaction thresholds under Chapter 14, the target’s exclusive distribution licence will terminate on change of control unless amended, which may materially affect earnings and therefore share price.
Disclosure timing: If the board authorises proceeding or a leak is reasonably suspected, an announcement must be published as soon as reasonably practicable and, in any event, before market open on the next trading day; consider requesting a short trading halt if rumour intensity rises.
Blackout/Model Code: The Company is in a closed period of 30 days before the interim results announcement; no dealings by directors, and no option or RSU grants (including to the incoming COO) may be made during this period.
PDPO: HR has circulated candidate CVs for Coral Peak management; please redact HKID numbers, home addresses, and personal emails/phones before inclusion in board papers; onward sharing is limited to the clean team only.
Communications: External references must use the code name only; media responses should rely solely on information in the 2024 annual report and the 10 Feb 2026 announcement; do not comment on price, timing, or board intentions.
Benign note: A sector roundup in the Pearl Bay Gazette speculating on beverage consolidation is not Company information and does not render our undisclosed transaction public or non-price-sensitive.
Funds interface: Seagrass Growth Fund SPC (Type 9 manager) has requested a management call; unless wall-crossed, restrict the discussion to publicly available data and previously announced operational initiatives.
Employment terms: Draft retention packages for Coral Peak plant supervisors are preliminary and non-binding; unlikely to be price-sensitive on a standalone basis but contain personal data subject to PDPO requirements.
Recordkeeping: Maintain a contemporaneous insider list with timestamps for all wall-crossed recipients; obtain written acknowledgements via return email to compliance@harborsky.com.hk.
